transcript.clean_text: they say you should never judge a book by its cover well today the road book described a stage that could well prove to test many mines as well as legs would the wind blow up as we headed towards the coast apparently almost guaranteed so some nerves to be dealt with as we headed for the coast a looping course and a nasty climb at the very end a familiar one as well this route part of the comunidad valenciana a couple of years ago well the rolling terrain at the beginning was always going to beg a breakaway and you didn't have to ask twice as bol magnus court boo lindemann and gibbons went off up the road very strong breakaway indeed dodging up to seven minutes at one time the gap who would engage the chase that was the big question because everyone feared that jumbo visma would indeed mug the field at the end of the day so they weren't going to chase bike exchange took their part so did movie star meanwhile as the gap came down to the breakaway ball decided he'd take himself some bonus money back to the team after taking the intermediate sprint no intermediate points left then as the pack started to close in and on the big circuit that we were dealing with two laps indeed of absolute hell as the wind picked up to about 28 kilometers per hour and it blew away the chances of kenny ellison staying in red he wasn't the only one to struggle hugh carty was off the back as well as mobistar picked up the pace big gaps were opening up so some strong riders were caught out as we approached the big turning point for our final climb they managed to regroup but at what cost at the end of the day the big test looming large and our breakaway just easing back or appearing to do so before the climb itself were they saving their energies for the last test and indeed could the pack catch them well there's plenty of strong riders still very much in contention behind the breakaway a roll of the dice when it came was from bull dedicated climber but not with the same strength as some others within that pack chase was fully engaged and indeed it was carabas and navares the ecuadorian guard of honor for aegon bernal who looked strong so did michael matthews who set off in pursuit he was animating it behind when suddenly magnus caught nielsen was left all on his own could they catch him that was the big question well a real battle royal with blastoff involved likewise badgioli was there out front court was holding on as matthews started to close the gap and roglich appeared suddenly just sailing by those around him and dragging badgioli into contention well the meters were running out and magnus court was reaching out for the line 150 to go and he was the hair with the hounds upon him would he make it and the answer thank heavens for all neutrals was yes but only just a breakaway day a fabulous victory for a man who finished third on stage four the red jersey transferring to the shoulders of primos roglic outstanding racing on an outstanding day the welter always entertained and so improved today magnus court ahead of roblox badgioli rounding out the top three blas off mass matthews burnout valverde megalanga lopez and gross hartner for borah hansgroh glitch in the red jersey he has media duties but looks comfortable in that role overall he's in control but look at moby's star so brave today they really put it on the line mass lopez and valverde all within 41 seconds as is aegon bernal from india's grenadiers well if that was a tough day just wait out for stage seven climbing throughout brutal most definitely and a full day's coverage on eurosport gcn from flag to line this will hurt and any gaps that we've had today are likely to become fishes tomorrow the welter rolls on in all its magnificent brutality just for our entertainment
